title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 104.1057 - Year 2000 plan, a qualified plan according to federal law
text:
104.1057.  Year 2000 plan, a qualified plan according to federal law. — The year 2000 plan is a qualified plan pursuant to the provisions of applicable federal law.  The benefits and conditions of the year 2000 plan shall always be adjusted to ensure that the tax-exempt status is maintained.
(L. 1999 S.B. 308 & 314)
